items.title: Security: settings.local.json permissions file has no integrity protection — silent injection enables pre-approved execution
items.desc:
## Summary

The `settings.local.json` file that controls which tool calls execute without user confirmation has no integrity protection. Any process running as the current user can silently inject permission entries, pre-approving arbitrary command execution. Claude Code will then execute those commands without prompting.

## Attack Surface

The permissions file lives at predictable paths:
- `<project>/.claude/settings.local.json` (project-level)
- `~/.claude/settings.json` (global)

Both are pl...
items.llm_title: Claude Code 配置文件权限注入漏洞
items.llm_summary: 控制工具执行权限的本地配置文件（settings.local.json）缺乏完整性保护。同用户下的任何进程均可静默修改该文件，注入恶意权限条目，使Claude Code在无需用户确认的情况下执行任意命令，造成远程代码执行风险。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 确保运行环境为当前用户。2. 定位项目目录下的`.claude/settings.local.json`或用户主目录下的`~/.claude/settings.json`。3. 向该文件中注入一个预批准的工具调用规则，例如允许执行`bash`命令。4. 在Claude Code中触发该工具调用，观察其是否会跳过确认直接执行。

items.title: Security: hooks system lacks visibility and write-time confirmation — silent global exfiltration surface
items.desc:
## Summary

Claude Code's `hooks` field in `~/.claude/settings.json` is a legitimate and useful feature. This is not a bug report. It's a request to harden a design surface that makes hooks trivially weaponizable without any user awareness.

**A real-world case already exists.** The package "Cozempic" (Ruya-AI/cozempic) was audited by community members in #48041 after its author was found dropping templated install prompts across 50+ issues in this repo. The audit found it: writes a global `Sess...
items.llm_title: Claude Code 会话钩子配置缺乏验证机制
items.llm_summary: 该条目揭示了Claude Code的`hooks`配置机制存在设计缺陷。攻击者可通过提供包含恶意钩子的配置（如写入恶意的`~/.claude/settings.json`），在用户无感知的情况下，静默地将敏感会话数据（如代码、环境变量）外泄到远程服务器，构成了一个隐蔽的全局数据泄露面。
items.llm_reproduction: 复现步骤基于条目中描述的真实攻击案例：1. 攻击者诱骗用户安装一个恶意的npm包（如‘Cozempic’）。2. 该包的安装脚本会向用户的`~/.claude/settings.json`文件中写入一个全局的`PreToolUse`钩子。3. 此钩子配置为在每次工具调用时，将完整的会话上下文数据（包括文件内容）发送至攻击者控制的外部URL。用户打开Claude Code进行任何操作时，数据即被静默窃取。

items.title: Bug: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR becomes a stale pointer mid-session, silently disarming PreToolUse security hooks
items.desc:
# Bug: `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` becomes a stale pointer mid-session, silently disarming PreToolUse security hooks

## Summary

PreToolUse security hooks configured via the documented `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/...` form **silently stop firing** when a skill or user action deletes the directory `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` points at — most commonly when a worktree-merge skill runs `git worktree remove --force` on the session's worktree.

The harness sets `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` once at session start and never re-r...
items.llm_title: Claude Code 会话安全钩子失效漏洞
items.llm_summary: 该漏洞是一个严重的设计缺陷：Claude Code的`PreToolUse`安全钩子依赖于一个在会话启动时设置的目录变量（`$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR`）。当该目录（如Git工作树）在会话中途被用户操作或技能删除时，钩子会因指向失效路径而静默停止工作，导致所有后续工具调用的安全检查被绕过，形成沙箱逃逸或权限提升的风险。
items.llm_reproduction:
1. 配置`$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR`指向一个Git工作树目录，并设置`PreToolUse`安全钩子。
2. 启动Claude Code会话。
3. 运行一个会删除该工作树的技能，例如执行`git worktree remove --force`。
4. 观察发现后续会话中的`PreToolUse`钩子不再触发，安全检查失效。

items.title: [Security] Ship a dedicated/bundled Node binary so macOS TCC permissions (FDA, Accessibility) are scoped to OpenClaw only
items.desc:
## Problem

When users grant **Full Disk Access** (or Accessibility) to OpenClaw on macOS, they must grant it to the shared `node` binary (e.g. `/usr/local/bin/node` or an nvm-managed path). macOS TCC has no mechanism to scope that permission to OpenClaw specifically — the grant applies to **every process that runs through the same binary**, including:

- All globally installed npm packages
- All `node_modules` in any project on the machine
- Any supply-chain-compromised dependency

This means a...
items.llm_title: OpenClaw macOS节点权限范围逃逸
items.llm_summary: 由于macOS的TCC权限模型限制，为OpenClaw授予的‘完全磁盘访问’或‘辅助功能’权限会绑定到系统共享的Node.js二进制文件上。这导致该权限无法被隔离在OpenClaw范围内，其他进程（包括恶意依赖）也能通过同一个Node二进制获得同等系统权限，造成权限逃逸风险。
items.llm_reproduction: 暂无（属于平台架构限制）

## Summary

This PR hardens agent-to-agent attachment forwarding so the host does not follow container-controlled symlinks when copying files from a source agent outbox into a target agent inbox.

Before this change, `forwardAttachedFiles(...)` accepted safe-looking attachment basenames and then used `fs.copyFileSync(src, dst)`. items.llm_title: OpenClaw 符号链接转发沙箱逃逸
items.llm_summary: 在多代理架构中，恶意代理可以在其可写目录中创建符号链接，指向宿主机上的敏感文件。当宿主机转发附件时，会遵循该符号链接，将目标文件从代理的沙箱环境中复制出来，导致沙箱逃逸和敏感信息泄露。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 一个恶意或被入侵的代理在其可写outbox目录中创建一个符号链接（例如 `ln -s /etc/passwd malicious_file`）。2. 该代理通过 `forwardAttachedFiles` 机制请求转发这个名为 `malicious_file` 的附件。3. 宿主机在复制文件时会遵循符号链接，将 `/etc/passwd` 文件内容复制到目标代理的inbox目录，完成沙箱逃逸。

items.title: feat(security): gate /restart and /build bot commands behind owner role check
items.desc:
## Problem

`/restart` and `/build` are Telegram bot commands that call `launchctl kickstart -k` to restart the host process. The only access control is `isMain === true` (command must come from the main group) — there is no user-level check. Any Telegram user who can post to the main group can restart NanoClaw.

Discovered during investigation of three unexpected restarts on 2026-05-07 (13:37, 13:52, 14:45).

Relevant code: `src/channels/telegram.ts:96–120`, `src/bot-commands.ts:31–62`.

## Fix...
items.llm_title: OpenClaw Telegram Bot 命令权限绕过
items.llm_summary: Telegram 机器人命令 `/restart` 和 `/build` 缺乏用户级权限验证，仅检查命令是否来自指定群组。任何能在该群组中发消息的用户都可以触发重启主机进程的操作，可能导致服务中断或用于配合其他攻击，造成拒绝服务。
items.llm_reproduction: 1. 作为任何Telegram用户，向配置了NanoClaw的Telegram群组发送 `/restart` 或 `/build` 命令。2. 机器人接收命令并验证 `isMain === true`（命令来自主群组），由于满足条件，直接执行 `launchctl kickstart -k` 重启宿主进程。3. 导致服务被意外或恶意地重启。

## Summary

items.llm_title: OpenClaw Webhook 未限体内存耗尽
items.llm_summary: NanoClaw的Webhook服务器在验证请求签名或令牌之前，会将整个请求体缓冲到内存中。攻击者可以发送一个超大的请求体，导致服务器内存耗尽（DoS），并可能为后续的内存破坏或代码执行攻击创造条件。修复措施是增加了请求体大小上限。

When operators front nanobot with a public tunnel or reverse proxy (cloudflared, ngrok, nginx), three configurations silently turn dangerous; a fourth even on default loopback lets any website drive the local agent. nanobot is built around a single-user, single-machine deployment model — these surfaces were meant for same-host use, but nothing in the code stopped them from being silently exposed.

items.llm_summary: 该条目描述了当AI编程工具（如nanobot）通过隧道或反向代理暴露到公网时，存在的多个严重安全风险：敏感的引导端点 `/webui/bootstrap` 可导致未授权的令牌发放，从而绕过认证访问API和WebSocket；同时存在浏览器跨站请求伪造漏洞，使恶意网站可能控制本地代理。
items.llm_reproduction:

items.title: Show HN: We scanned 306 MCP servers – 10% have critical vulnerabilities
items.desc:
We've been scanning MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to understand the security posture of the ecosystem. After 306 servers and 1,211 vulnerabilities, here's what we found:

- 69 critical vulnerabilities - 32 servers using eval() on untrusted input - 31 SQL injection vulnerabilities - 32 servers with hardcoded API credentials

10.5% of servers have at least one critical vulnerability.
